content.name: Neon Cyberpunk
content.description: Futuristic cyberpunk theme with neon highlights and dark backgrounds

content.body: A stunning cyberpunk-inspired theme featuring electric blue and neon green syntax highlighting against a deep dark background. Perfect for night coding sessions.

content.name: Ocean Breeze
content.description: Calming light theme with ocean-inspired blues and soft whites

content.body: A soothing light theme inspired by ocean waves and sea breeze. Features soft blues, gentle whites, and calming contrast for comfortable daytime coding.

content.name: PowerShell Advanced Snippets
content.description: Comprehensive collection of PowerShell snippets for automation and scripting

content.body: Over 150 carefully crafted PowerShell snippets covering common automation tasks, error handling, module creation, and advanced scripting patterns.

files.name: powershell-snippets.json
files.content:
{
  "Function with Error Handling": {
    "prefix": "ps-func-error",
    "body": [
      "function ${1:FunctionName} {",
      "    [CmdletBinding()]",
      "    param(",
      "        [Parameter(Mandatory = \$true)]",
      "        [string]\$${2:ParameterName}",
      "    )",
      "    ",
      "    try {",
      "        ${3:# Function logic here}",
      "        Write-Verbose \"Executing ${1:FunctionName}...\"",
      "        ${0}",
      "    }",
      "    catch {",
      "        Write-Error \"Error in ${1:FunctionName}: \$($_.Exception.Message)\"",
      "        throw",
      "    }",
      "}"
    ],
    "description": "Creates a PowerShell function with proper error handling"
  },
  "Advanced Module Manifest": {
    "prefix": "ps-module-manifest",
    "body": [
      "@{",
      "    RootModule = '${1:ModuleName}.psm1'",
      "    ModuleVersion = '${2:1.0.0}'",
      "    GUID = '${3:$(New-Guid)}'",
      "    Author = '${4:Your Name}'",
      "    CompanyName = '${5:Your Company}'",
      "    Copyright = '(c) $(Get-Date -Format yyyy) ${4:Your Name}. All rights reserved.'",
      "    Description = '${6:Module Description}'",
      "    PowerShellVersion = '5.1'",
      "    FunctionsToExport = @('${7:Function1}', '${8:Function2}')",
      "    CmdletsToExport = @()",
      "    VariablesToExport = '*'",
      "    AliasesToExport = @()",
      "    Tags = @('${9:Tag1}', '${10:Tag2}')",
      "    LicenseUri = '${11:https://github.com/user/repo/blob/main/LICENSE}'",
      "    ProjectUri = '${12:https://github.com/user/repo}'",
      "    RequiredModules = @()",
      "}"
    ],
    "description": "Creates a comprehensive PowerShell module manifest"
  }
}
